title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 9
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear boy and girl talking about the tennis lesson.
items.audio_script: Boy: Hi, Jack. I’m checking the plan for the tennis lesson. I thought we were going to play outside, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Girl: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The coach booked the indoor court because it might rain[/1]. || Boy: Good thing I asked. I nearly brought only sunglasses. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Girl: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Hi, Jack. I’m checking the plan for the tennis lesson. I thought we were going to play outside, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. The coach booked the indoor court because it might rain.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly brought only sunglasses. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where will the tennis lesson be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, outdoor tennis court, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, indoor tennis court, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school gym with basketball hoops, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “The coach booked the indoor court because it might rain.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the photography club.
items.audio_script: Customer: Hi, Emma. I’m checking the plan for the photography club. [1]Bring your camera cable so we can move the photos[/1]. || Customer: Good thing I asked. I nearly carried my laptop all day. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear student and teacher talking about the shop opening.
items.audio_script: Student: Hi, Anna. I’m checking the plan for the shop opening. I thought we were going to go at eleven, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Teacher: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The shop opens at half past eleven on Sundays[/1]. || Student: Good thing I asked. I nearly stood outside for ages. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Teacher: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
